messages.content: What time does the HFS dining hall close tonight?
Most HFS dining halls close at 8 PM on weeknights. Local Point in Lander Hall is open until 11 PM if you need a late option. Which residence hall are you closest to?
I'm in McMahon. Is there food there?
Yes! McMahon Hall has a dining area on the ground floor. It's typically open for breakfast from 7 to 10 AM, lunch from 11 AM to 2 PM, and dinner from 5 to 8 PM on weekdays.

Weekend hours are usually brunch from 10 AM to 2 PM and dinner from 5 to 7 PM. Hours can vary during finals week and breaks, so I'd recommend checking the HFS website or the UW Food app for the most current info.
